title: Diemant's Prismarine
description: Are you tired of the regular prismarine textures? This pack reimagines prismarine blocks in hopes that will make them more useful in builds.
body:
![Diemant's Prismarine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8829bc3e0151e3e68d732adc8bb1d8e772a06cbb.png)
# Diemant's Prismarine
## Are you tired of vanilla prismarine textures?

This texture pack introduces new reimagined textures for:
-   Prismarine (animation included)
-   Prismarine Bricks
-   Prismarine Shard
-   Prismarine Crystal
-   Sea Lantern (animation included)

If you encounter any issues with this pack, please submit them using GitHub.
